title: rootless: fix usage on Fedora Silverblue/CoreOS
body:
here the home directory is a symlink to `/var/home` and runc does like symlinks into the rootfs path.

Resolve the path to the storage before using it.

As part of the PR, also fix the code propagation from the re-exec'ed podman.

comments.body: I've missed the notifications on this one, just updated the PR with the last comments I've got.

:pushpin: Commit 62e48e5 has been approved by `mheon`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=mheon 62e48e5b71abe3002361bbf018961f8031fba03e -->
Homu seems to be hung, forcing merge.
